_notes: APEC members: 21 'economies' (the term APEC uses to accommodate Hong Kong and Chinese Taipei as members alongside sovereign states). Hong Kong is not a sovereign state and is not represented in this state-level membership list. Chinese Taipei (Taiwan, ISO 158) is included — APEC is the most prominent international forum where Taiwan participates as a full member.
name: Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation
mission: Inter-governmental forum of 21 Pacific Rim economies, promoting free trade and economic cooperation throughout the Asia-Pacific. Includes major economies on all sides of the Pacific.
